{
    public sealed class IConfigurationMock : global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration>, global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration
    {
        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        internal IConfigurationMock(global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration mockObject, global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration> engine)
            : base(mockObject, engine) { }

        string? global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetSectionValue(string key) => Object.GetSectionValue(key);

        string? global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration.this[string key] { get => Object[key]; set => Object[key] = value; }
    }
}

namespace Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration
{
    file sealed class IConfigurationMockImpl : global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration, global::TUnit.Mocks.IRaisable, global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject
    {
        private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration> _engine;

        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

        internal IConfigurationMockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration> engine)
        {
            _engine = engine;
        }

        public string? GetSectionValue(string key)
        {
            return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<string?, string>(0, "GetSectionValue", key, default);
        }

        public string? this[string key]
        {
            get => _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<string?>(1, "get_Item", new object?[] { key }, default);
            set => _engine.HandleCall(2, "set_Item", new object?[] { key, value });
        }

        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
        {
            throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
        }
    }

    internal static class IConfigurationMockFactory
    {
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Register()
        {
            global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterFactory<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration>(Create);
        }

        internal static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration> CreateAutoMock(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior)
        {
            var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration>(behavior);
            var impl = new IConfigurationMockImpl(engine);
            engine.Raisable = impl;
            var mock = new IConfigurationMock(impl, engine);
            return mock;
        }

        internal static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration> Create(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior, object[] constructorArgs)
        {
            if (constructorArgs.Length > 0) throw new global::System.ArgumentException($"Interface mock 'global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration' does not support constructor arguments, but {constructorArgs.Length} were provided.");
            var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration>(behavior);
            var impl = new IConfigurationMockImpl(engine);
            engine.Raisable = impl;
            var mock = new IConfigurationMock(impl, engine);
            return mock;
        }
    }
}

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    public sealed class Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall : global::TUnit.Mocks.Verification.ICallVerification
    {
        private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess _engine;
        private readonly int _memberId;
        private readonly string _memberName;
        private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] _matchers;
        private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<string?>? _builder;

        internal Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall(global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess engine, int memberId, string memberName, global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] matchers)
        {
            _engine = engine;
            _memberId = memberId;
            _memberName = memberName;
            _matchers = matchers;
        }

        private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<string?> EnsureSetup()
        {
            var existing = global::System.Threading.Volatile.Read(ref _builder);
            if (existing is not null) return existing;
            return EnsureSetupSlow();
        }

        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
        private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<string?> EnsureSetupSlow()
        {
            var setup = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetup(_memberId, _matchers, _memberName);
            var fresh = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<string?>(setup);
            var prev = global::System.Threading.Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref _builder, fresh, null);
            if (prev is not null) return prev;
            // AddSetup runs only on the CAS winner. Setup is sequential in practice,
            // so a concurrent loser observing the builder before registration is benign.
            _engine.AddSetup(setup);
            return fresh;
        }

        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Returns(string? value) { EnsureSetup().Returns(value); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Returns(global::System.Func<string?> factory) { EnsureSetup().Returns(factory); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall ReturnsSequentially(params string?[] values) { EnsureSetup().ReturnsSequentially(values); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Throws<TException>() where TException : global::System.Exception, new() { EnsureSetup().Throws<TException>(); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Throws(global::System.Exception exception) { EnsureSetup().Throws(exception); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Callback(global::System.Action callback) { EnsureSetup().Callback(callback); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall TransitionsTo(string stateName) { EnsureSetup().TransitionsTo(stateName); return this; }
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Then() { EnsureSetup().Then(); return this; }

        /// <summary>Configure a typed computed return value using the actual method parameters.</summary>
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Returns(global::System.Func<string, string?> factory)
        {
            EnsureSetup().Returns(args => factory((string)args[0]!));
            return this;
        }

        /// <summary>Execute a typed callback using the actual method parameters.</summary>
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Callback(global::System.Action<string> callback)
        {
            EnsureSetup().Callback(callback);
            return this;
        }

        /// <summary>Configure a typed computed exception using the actual method parameters.</summary>
        public Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_GetSectionValue_M0_MockCall Throws(global::System.Func<string, global::System.Exception> exceptionFactory)
        {
            EnsureSetup().Throws(args => exceptionFactory((string)args[0]!));
            return this;
        }

        // ICallVerification
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasCalled() => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasCalled();
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times) => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasCalled(times);
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times, string? message) => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasCalled(times, message);
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasCalled(string? message) => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasCalled(message);
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasNeverCalled() => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasNeverCalled();
        /// <inheritdoc />
        public void WasNeverCalled(string? message) => _engine.CreateVerification(_memberId, _memberName, _matchers).WasNeverCalled(message);
    }

namespace TUnit.Mocks
{
    public static class Microsoft_Extensions_Configuration_IConfiguration_MockStaticExtension
    {
        extension(global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration _)
        {
            public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMock Mock()
            {
                return (global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMock)global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMockFactory.CreateAutoMock(global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock.DefaultBehavior);
            }

            public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMock Mock(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior)
            {
                return (global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMock)global::Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationMockFactory.CreateAutoMock(behavior);
            }
        }
    }
